differences.production: Very dense vertical stacking with tight gutters/padding and compressed section spacing.
differences.prototype: Roomier modal composition with consistent large paddings, wider gutters, and stronger section separation.
differences.impact: Major mismatch in visual rhythm and readability.

differences.production: Smaller type scale and flatter weight contrast between title, labels, and stats.
differences.prototype: Clearer hierarchy with larger headline, stronger weight tiers, and better stat emphasis.
differences.impact: Information priority is harder to scan in production.

differences.production: Flatter navy surfaces with lower depth and less controlled accent balance.
differences.prototype: Richer blue-black gradient, cleaner red/green accents, and better contrast tuning.
differences.impact: Production looks less premium and less aligned to brand mood.

differences.production: Smaller/inconsistent radii across cards, rows, and thumbnails.
differences.prototype: More uniform, slightly larger radii that create a cohesive glass-card language.

differences.production: Limited glow/blur depth; cards read mostly flat.
differences.prototype: Noticeable soft shadows, inner glow, and glassmorphism depth.
differences.impact: Loss of depth and visual polish.

differences.production: Avatar/hero thumbnails are smaller and less dominant; less consistent visual weight.
differences.prototype: Larger primary avatar and stronger hero tile presence.
differences.impact: Key identity and hero-pool sections carry less visual impact.

differences.production: Secondary blocks compete with primary player summary; CTA emphasis is weaker.
differences.prototype: Clear top-down hierarchy: player identity -> hero pool -> performance -> achievements -> matches -> primary CTA.
differences.impact: User attention flow is less guided in production.

top_3_fixes: Match the same breakpoint/layout system as prototype: increase container width behavior, section paddings, and inter-section spacing tokens.
Adopt prototype typography scale and weights for title, stat values, labels, and CTA to restore hierarchy.
Implement shared visual tokens for surface gradient, border-radius, blur/shadow depth, and image size presets (avatar + hero tiles).
